name: codex-reviewer
description: Local-first code review workflows for PRs, diffs, and review-fix loops.

interface.shortDescription: Local PR and diff review without CodeRabbit as a dependency
interface.longDescription: Codex Reviewer provides local-first code review workflows for changed code, pull requests, security-sensitive diffs, and follow-up fix loops. It routes to Semgrep, CodeQL, domain skills, and GitHub PR context when useful, while keeping findings grounded in files, lines, and reproducible failure paths.
defaultPrompt: Review this branch for real bugs
Review PR feedback and fix valid issues
